name: One Foot in the Grave
timing: Interrupt a Jog or Step action, or Reaction Step.
description: The character does not move and the action (as well as any spent energy) is lost. The character suffers 1 Wd each time they are moved until end of turn.
extraDescription: 'Moved' includes Jogs, Steps, Reactions Steps and any other abilities which cause this model to be moved.
